fields.label: Custom Subdomain
fields.description: Custom Subdomain of your Grist account (host token in the API base URL)

fields.label: Document ID
fields.description: In your document, click your profile icon, then Document Settings, then copy the value under "This document's ID"

fields.label: Table ID
fields.description: ID of table to operate on. If unsure, look at the Code View.

fields.label: Data to Send
fields.description: Whether to insert the input data this node receives in the new row

fields.label: Inputs to Ignore
fields.description: List of input properties to avoid sending, separated by commas. Leave empty to send all properties.

fields.label: Fields to Send
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: properties, properties.fieldId, properties.fieldValue)

fields.label: Row ID
fields.description: ID of the row to delete, or comma-separated list of row IDs to delete

fields.label: Return All
fields.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

fields.label: Limit
fields.description: Max number of results to return

fields.label: Additional Options
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: filter, sort)
